welcome.subject: Welcome to Kindar, {name}!
welcome.tagline: Organized routine for the whole family
welcome.intro: Your Kindar account is ready. Now you can organize the kids' routine all in one place.
welcome.step1Body: Give it a name and register your first child.
welcome.step2Body: Share access to view and update everything together.
welcome.step3Body: Set up custody — who cares on which days.
welcome.footer: You received this email because you created a Kindar account. If it wasn't you, ignore this message.

signupRescue.subject: Your Kindar access is unlocked
signupRescue.intro: We found a technical issue in our email confirmation system that blocked your access. It was not you — it was us, and we are sorry for the delay.
signupRescue.fixedBody: Your account is active. Sign in directly — no need to reconfirm anything.
signupRescue.replyHint: If anything does not work, reply to this email. We read every reply.

loginAlert.intro: We detected a new sign-in to your account. Details below:
loginAlert.notYouBody: Change your password immediately using the button below.
loginAlert.footer: You get this email for security when a new device signs in. It is not an alert about a breach.
